data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Reviewed feature/gemini-scan-models at ead1e657109cffd09c0cf82526e42db96019ae2c against the knot acceptance criteria. Gemini scan options are now restricted to exactly five static model IDs: gemini-3.1-pro-preview, gemini-3-flash-preview, gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-2.5-flash, and gemini-2.5-flash-lite, and out-of-set detected Gemini history models no longer appear in the selector. Preview labels render as Gemini Pro 3.1 Preview and Gemini Flash 3 Preview. Verified read-only review coverage with bun run test src/lib/__tests__/settings-scan.test.ts, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build; all passed, with only a pre-existing lint warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx unrelated to this change.
